message.content: {"score": 5, "reasoning": "The assistant clearly treats this as an interactive chat: it explains the concept conversationally, uses a fenced Rust code block, and ends with follow-up questions. There is no programmatic schema to follow, and the behavior matches the interactive anchor.", "rubric_quotes": ["5 = Consistently and precisely tailors behavior to the interaction type. By default, treats conversations as interactive: uses clarifying and follow-up questions when helpful, and wraps code in triple-backtick code blocks even when code is the only content."]}
